item.title: howtomakenotes
item.author: 作者
item.description: logseq - > 1. start 2. template 3. query -> 1. https://logseq.github.io/#/page/queries 2. https://logseq.github.io/#/page/Advanced%20Queries 4. tool - > 1. RoamHightlight 2. cal 3. marco new - > org txt How to make notes - > https://nesslabs.com/dendron-featured-tool How to make notes from Quora Schemas are taxonomies that work over hierarchies. You can write a schema to describe a given hierarchy — projects, meetings, research topics — and attach templates to any node in the hierarchy.
